concepts.title: Gattermann Aldehyde Synthesis Part 2
concepts.conceptBody:
Gattermann Aldehyde Synthesis 

When phenol is treated with liquid$\text{HCN}$ and gaseous $\text{HCl}$ in presence of anhydrous $\text{AlC}{{\text{l}}_{3}}$, product formed is hydrolysed $\text{Ph}$ - hydroxy benzaldehyde.

Mechanism: 

Step 1: Formation of electrophile

Step 2: Electrophilic substitution Reaction an Phenol
